'''vadhoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabildo|cabildo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabildo|cabildo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vadhoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vædheyeth|vædheyeth]] || [[word:vædheyej|vædheyej]] || [[word:vædheyesh|vædheyesh]] || [[word:vædheye|vædheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadhodhoyoth|vadhodhoyoth]] || [[word:vadhodhoyoj|vadhodhoyoj]] || [[word:vadhodhoyosh|vadhodhoyosh]] || [[word:vadhodhoyo|vadhodhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadhoyoth|vadhoyoth]] || [[word:vadhoyoj|vadhoyoj]] || [[word:vadhoyosh|vadhoyosh]] || [[word:vadhoyo|vadhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadhofyoth|vadhofyoth]] || [[word:vadhofyoj|vadhofyoj]] || [[word:vadhofyosh|vadhofyosh]] || [[word:vadhofyof|vadhofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vadhoyotho|vadhoyotho]] || [[word:vadhoyojo|vadhoyojo]] || [[word:vadhoyosho|vadhoyosho]] || [[word:vadhoyoko|vadhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vadhoyoth|vadhoyoth]] || [[word:vadhoyoj|vadhoyoj]] || [[word:vadhoyosh|vadhoyosh]] || [[word:vadhoyo|vadhoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vadhoyothol|vadhoyothol]] || [[word:vadhoyojol|vadhoyojol]] || [[word:vadhoyoshol|vadhoyoshol]] || [[word:vadhoyokol|vadhoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vadhoyothotho|vadhoyothotho]] || [[word:vadhoyojojo|vadhoyojojo]] || [[word:vadhoyoshosho|vadhoyoshosho]] || [[word:vadhoyoko|vadhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vadhoyothon|vadhoyothon]] || [[word:vadhoyojon|vadhoyojon]] || [[word:vadhoyoshon|vadhoyoshon]] || [[word:vadhoyokon|vadhoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vadhoyothoro|vadhoyothoro]] || [[word:vadhoyojoro|vadhoyojoro]] || [[word:vadhoyoshoro|vadhoyoshoro]] || [[word:vadhoyokoro|vadhoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
